variables.notes: No explicit depreciation or amortisation row related to COGS/cost of sales appears in the operating section above financial lines. Therefore, relative to the selected COGS row 'Costs of goods sold', there is no separate D&A row to add.

No explicit depreciation or amortisation row related to SG&A/operating overhead appears in the operating section above financial lines. Therefore, relative to the selected XSGA component rows 'Selling expenses', 'Administrative expenses', and 'Other operating expenses', there is no separate D&A row to add.
